# Paper Directory

This directory is reserved for manuscript material generated from runtime artifacts.

## Tracked Public Surface
- this `README.md`
- placeholder folders such as `figures/`, `tables/`, and `appendix/`

## Runtime-Generated Files
- `paper_draft.md`
- manuscript source files such as `main.tex`
- rendered tables and copied figures

These generated paper files are intentionally not tracked by default in the public repo.

## Rule
Any manuscript content should be derived from `outputs/registries/` and `outputs/paper_assets/`, not transcribed manually from ad hoc logs.
